articles.title: 5 corruption gaps Congress must close in the Clarity Act
articles.description: The most consequential crypto legislation in the world is moving forward in the U.S. Senate. As written, it leaves the United States exposed to money laundering, sanctions evasion, and conflicts of interest at the highest levels of government, argues Greytak.

articles.title: Apple says it may remove some apps from the App Store if they don’t attract users
articles.description: Apple may begin removing existing apps that it considers stale, low-value, or unable to attract users.

articles.title: Trad.Fi, W3 target $650 million in onchain private credit using AI evaluation
articles.description: Equipment-financing lender Trad.Fi is working with W3 to automate capital workflows and bring real-economy business lending onto public blockchain rails.

articles.title: Apple brings streaming-style subscription bundles to the App Store
articles.description: Apple is expanding its App Bundles feature to allow developers to partner with one another on discounted subscription packages.

articles.title: Ethena lands Janus Henderson backing as asset manager invests in ENA, eyes USDe distribution
articles.description: The deal underscores the trend of traditional asset managers backing DeFi infrastructure, following BlackRock's Uniswap and Apollo's Morpho investments.

articles.title: Come back after the summer, says one analyst on crypto markets
articles.description: Bitcoin's growing divergence from tech stocks raises concerns as AI spending surges, says Quinn Thompson.

articles.title: Bitcoin bottom? These four charts hint at BTC price dropping to $50K
articles.description: A $50,000 Bitcoin price target remains in play despite BTC maintaining above $60,000 support for now, as multiple indicators warn the bottom may not be in.

articles.title: Apple’s App Store rolls out personalized recommendations
articles.description: Apple will now recommend apps based on your downloads and behavior.

articles.title: Blockchain researchers warn HTX sanctions may blur crypto risk signals
articles.description: Researchers say broad HTX tainting could freeze legitimate users and make compliance tools less useful for tracing illicit funds.

articles.title: A16z, Paradigm lead $175 million bet to move global credit markets onchain
articles.description: Morpho secured $175 million from Paradigm, a16z crypto and Ribbit as the lending protocol seeks to become foundational infrastructure for onchain credit markets.

articles.title: Privacy push as StarkWare and Sui move toward compliance-ready confidential transfers
articles.description: StarkWare and Sui roll out confidential transfer systems as Zama boosts compliance efforts and Zcash’s Orchard bug highlights risks in shielded privacy models.

articles.title: Sandstone raises $30M to bring AI to in-house legal teams
articles.description: Sandstone's Series A was led by Lightspeed Partners, with participation from Sequoia.

articles.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: AAVE Drops 2.6% as all constituents trade lower
articles.description: Uniswap (UNI), down 2.9% from Monday, joined Aave (AAVE) as an underperformer.

articles.title: Bitcoin inflows slow sharply in 2026 as investors chase AI, Bernstein says
articles.description: Bernstein said bitcoin's increasingly diversified ownership base supports its long-term store-of-value thesis.

articles.title: BlackRock warns of energy shock as May CPI is set to show acceleration in inflation
articles.description: BlackRock is closely watching Wednesday's CPI as an early test of how U.S.-Iran tensions are feeding into already elevated prices in the economy.

articles.title: Live updates: bitcoin drifts back to $61,000, putting damper on hope for two straight up days
articles.description: Crypto prices rose on Monday following last week's crash, but the bears still appear to be in control.

articles.title: MiCA architect says EU should prioritize tokenization over DeFi rules
articles.description: One of MiCA's architects said he sees no need to regulate DeFi as the European Commission gathers feedback on the framework's future.

articles.title: Bitcoin 'normal' 4-year cycle puts focus on $53K low before 2028 BTC price high
articles.description: Bitcoin trader said that BTC price was approaching its cycle bottom "window" with the $53,000 cycle midpoint a potential buy-in level.
